name: payment-integration-starter-kit
description: Embeddable Stripe, PayPal, and demo checkout widget for small web projects.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/data/products.js && node --check src/routes/health.routes.js && node --check src/routes/products.routes.js && node --check src/routes/stripe.routes.js && node --check src/routes/paypal.routes.js && node --check src/routes/demo.routes.js && node --check src/services/stripe.service.js && node --check src/services/paypal.service.js && node --check public/payment-widget.js && node --check public/app.js

author: Nathan May
